input.background: Table 3.3 lists body weights of 53 students.
input.question: How would we plot this data in a way that is most revealing?

output.method: 用茎叶图展示单变量分布及原始数值结构的问题。其核心是既保留原始数值信息又展示分布形态。
output.answer:
First notice that values range from 100 to 260 pounds. Using a multiplier of $\times 100$ would result in only two stem values (100-199 and 200-299). Splitting stem values with the $\times 100$ in two would help, but would still result in only four stem values: 100-149, 150-199, 200-249, and 250-299. Using quintuple-split stem values produces this nice plot:
```
1*|0000111
1T |2222222233333
1F |4455555
1S |\underline{6}66777777
1. |888888888999
2*|0111
2T |2
2F|
2S|6
X100
```
This plot has a positive skew and high outlier. The location of its median is underlined (median $=160$ ), and data spread from 100 to 260.

body_weight.description: Body weights of 53 students in pounds.
